title: Toggle off emoji feature in text columns
excerpt:

posts.author: ksinghasemanon (Kristin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

There should be a way to disable the emoji option in text columns. It disrupts the ability to tab through columns when entering items manually, and is just added clutter for teams who do not use emojis in this context.

What are you trying to achieve

I’d like to see a new setting created to allow admins or users to toggle off emojis in text columns. Since the text column can be used for a multitude of purposes, it would make sense to allow toggling at the column level, but offering the setting at multiple levels would be even better (workspace, board, column). The emoji feature could be an option for people who want it, but shouldn’t be imposed universally on text columns.
